title: 🐶 Calming Music for Dogs - 12 Hours Home Alone 🐾
description:
Leave this playing when your dog is home alone. Twelve hours of calming music created to help your dog relax, settle, and feel safe - perfect for time home alone, bedtime, storms, and fireworks. No loops and no sudden changes, so your dog can rest without interruption.

▶ More calming music: https://www.soothemydog.com
Every video features original music made just for that video.

Note: this music is meant to help your dog relax. It is not a substitute for veterinary care. If your dog has severe anxiety or a medical condition, please talk to your veterinarian.

As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases.
